creator: per@kaffe.mustafejen.se
text:
I just tried with
FreeBSD konjak 14.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE releng/14.1-n267679-10e31f0946d8 GENERIC amd64

and now (after turning off pulseaudio)

I can set the value, turn on pulseaudio again and adjust
the recording volume with Pulseaudio Volume Control :-)

Thanks a lot!

I used to have to remap the USB microphone to a mono source in pulseaudio

Now I tried adding the sysctl in /etc/sysctl.conf, rebooted
and after this I got the right volume at 100% (0dB) in pulseaudio.

Thanks a lot whoever fixed this :-)
